findings.title: Omission of OpenTofu fork and modern state management paradigms

evidence.heading: # Terraform
evidence.excerpt: Terraform is an open-source infrastructure as code (IaC) tool developed by HashiCorp

findings.recommendation: Acknowledge the OpenTofu fork in the introduction due to the 2023 license change. Update state management guidance to emphasize remote backends, state locking, and directory-based workspace patterns over legacy workspaces. Introduce Terragrunt for DRY configuration management.

findings.title: Lack of IaC testing and policy-as-code tooling references

evidence.heading: # Terraform
evidence.excerpt: Terraform's state management and modular structure allow for efficient scaling

findings.recommendation: Add references to industry-standard IaC testing and validation tools such as Terratest, tflint, Checkov, or OPA/Sentinel. Modern production workflows require automated linting, security scanning, and integration tests before deployment.
